info.title: dotnet-inspect
info.description: dotnet-inspect 0.7.6+f5f72fb - A CLI tool for inspecting .NET libraries and NuGet packages

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show progress messages on stderr

options.name: -v
options.description: Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)

options.name: --tips
options.description: Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)

options.name: --info
options.description: Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr

options.name: --head
options.description: Limit to first N lines (like head -n)

options.name: --tail
options.description: Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)

options.name: --session
options.description: Clear a named isolated session cache

commands.name: demo
commands.description: Run curated demo queries that showcase the tool

options.name: --feeling-lucky
options.description: Pick a random demo and run it

options.name: --head
options.description: Limit to first N lines (like head -n)

commands.name: depends
commands.description: Walk dependency graphs upward (type hierarchy, library references, or package dependencies)

options.name: --package
options.description: Search in package(s) (name or name@version). Can repeat.

options.name: --library
options.description: Search in library file(s). Can repeat.

options.name: --platform
options.description: Search all platform frameworks (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard)

options.name: --extensions
options.description: Search curated Microsoft.Extensions.* packages

options.name: --aspnetcore
options.description: Search curated Microsoft.AspNetCore.* packages

options.name: --tfm
options.description: Target framework (e.g., net8.0)

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --compact
options.description: Minified JSON (use with --json)

options.name: --mermaid
options.description: Output as mermaid diagram (standalone or with --markdown for embedded)

options.name: --markdown
options.description: Output as markdown

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show progress messages on stderr

options.name: -v
options.description: Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)

options.name: --tips
options.description: Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)

options.name: --info
options.description: Show operational metrics (output, time, HTTP, cache) on stderr

options.name: --head
options.description: Limit to first N lines (like head -n)

options.name: --tail
options.description: Limit to last N lines (like tail -n)

options.name: --source
options.description: NuGet source URL (replaces defaults, can repeat)

options.name: --add-source
options.description: NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)

options.name: --nugetconfig
options.description: Path to nuget.config file

arguments.name: TYPE
arguments.description: Type name to walk dependencies for (e.g., IFloatingPointIeee754, Int128)

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Compare API surfaces between package or platform versions

options.name: --package
options.description: Package with version range (e.g., System.Text.Json@9.0.0..10.0.2)

options.name: --platform
options.description: Platform library with version range (e.g., System.Text.Json@8.0.23..10.0.2)

options.name: --framework
options.description: Framework for platform diff (runtime, aspnetcore). Default: runtime

options.name: --tfm
options.description: Target framework (e.g., net8.0)

options.name: --all
options.description: Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members

options.name: --type
options.description: Filter to specific type(s)

options.name: --oneline
options.description: One result per line, columnar output

options.name: --no-header
options.description: Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)

options.name: --name-only
options.description: Show only type names that changed

options.name: --breaking
options.description: Show only breaking changes

options.name: --additive
options.description: Show only additive changes

options.name: --legend
options.description: Show legend explaining change symbols

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show progress messages on stderr

options.name: -v
options.description: Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)

options.name: --add-source
options.description: NuGet source URL to add (can repeat)

options.name: --nugetconfig
options.description: Path to nuget.config file

options.name: --section
options.description: Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)

arguments.name: ARGS
arguments.description: Version range and type filter. When no --package/--platform is given, first arg is the package version range.

commands.name: extensions

options.name: --reachable
options.description: Include extensions on types reachable via properties/methods

options.name: --depth
options.description: Max depth for reachable type traversal (default: 2)

options.name: --tfm
options.description: Target framework (e.g., net8.0)

options.name: --all
options.description: Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members

options.name: --type
options.description: Limit type count (-t 5) or filter by glob (-t *Json*)

commands.name: member
commands.description: Inspect type members (docs on by default)

options.name: --package
options.description: Source: package (file, name, or name@version)

options.name: --library
options.description: Source: library path (local file, or relative within package)

options.name: --platform
options.description: Source: platform library (e.g., System.Text.Json)

options.name: --framework
options.description: Source: platform framework (runtime, aspnetcore, netstandard). @version for specific

options.name: --tfm
options.description: Source: select by TFM (e.g., net8.0)

options.name: --all
options.description: Include non-public, hidden, and obsolete members

options.name: --member
options.description: Filter members by name (supports globs, Type.Member dotted syntax)

options.name: --ctor
options.description: Filter members to constructors (shorthand for -m .ctor)

options.name: --head
options.description: Limit to first N lines (like head -n)

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON

options.name: --compact
options.description: Output as minified JSON (use with --json)

options.name: --oneline
options.description: One result per line, columnar output

options.name: --no-header
options.description: Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)

options.name: --unsafe
options.description: Filter members to unsafe signatures (pointers)

options.name: --index
options.description: Select member overload by index (or use Name:N shorthand)

options.name: --params
options.description: Select member overload by parameter types (comma-separated)

options.name: -of
options.description: Select member overload by first parameter type

options.name: --show-index
options.description: Show member overload index (Name:N) column

options.name: --kind
options.description: Filter by member kind (method, property, field, event, constructor)

options.name: --discover
options.description: Discover schema: sections, or items within a section

options.description: Select sections by name (comma-separated, supports wildcards)

options.description: Show sections with data (runs full pipeline)

arguments.name: ARGS
arguments.description: Package, type name, and member filter. When no --package/--library/--platform is given, first arg is the package.

options.name: --dependencies
options.description: Show transitive package dependency tree (tip: use 'depends --package' instead)

options.name: --layout
options.description: Show package file tree

options.name: --files
options.description: List files in the package (flat list, filterable with --tfm)

options.name: --tfms
options.description: List target frameworks in the package

options.name: --lib
options.description: Scope to lib/ folder (use with --files or --layout)

options.name: --tools
options.description: Scope to tools/ folder (use with --files or --layout)

options.name: --versions
options.description: List available versions (optionally limit count)

options.name: --prerelease
options.description: With --versions: include prerelease versions

options.name: --readme
options.description: Show the README.md content from the package

options.name: --tfm
options.description: Select library by TFM (e.g., net8.0)

options.name: --version
options.description: Package version (or use alone to show resolved version)

options.name: --latest-version
options.description: Show latest version from nuget.org

options.name: --out
options.description: Write output to file instead of stdout

options.description: One result per line, columnar output

options.name: --no-header
options.description: Suppress column headers (use with --oneline)

options.description: Verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), n(ormal), d(etailed)

options.name: --tips
options.description: Tip verbosity: q(uiet), m(inimal), d(etailed)

options.name: --offline
options.description: Disable all network access (use cached data only)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information
